entries.label: Is there any evidence of leaks from the containers and equipment listed in Table 2?
Is there any evidence of leaks from the piping, hoses, pumps, and valves associated with the containers and equipment listed in Table 2?
Is there any evidence of deterioration caused by corrosion of the containers and equipment listed in Table 2 or associated piping, hoses, pumps, valves, supports, and foundations?
Are tank level gauges and sensing devices visible and operating correctly?
Have all tank level gauges and sensing devices been tested at least once during the last 6 months?
Are all containers clearly and properly labeled?
Are drum/tote lids and bungs securely closed?
Are there any stains on the property grounds, sheens on paved areas or ditches, or signs of pollution at the stormwater outfall(s)?
Are there any unusual odors (i.e., petroleum) from the secondary containment structures (e.g., tanks, spill pallets, etc.)?
Are there any signs of cracking, gaps at joints, or damage in secondary containment structures (e.g., double-walled tank, spill pallets, etc.)?
Is there any liquid in the double walled tank interstitial space?
If yes to question above, is a sheen or free product observed?
Are any general housekeeping issues observed?
Are spill kits in operational status and adequately stocked?
